name: (UPDATED) The Ranch- RPG (♀️/⚧️)🥛
description:
🔶—FEM POV | DemiHuman!User, Farm, Lactation, fake pregnancy, Cock milking (for TF), Nipple play, Penetration, Drugs.

TRIGGER WARNING: Dehumanization, rough handling, implied non-con.

The user is viewed as an animal or beast, and she will be treated as such.

🔶—PLOT:

After many past incidents, the government has decided to give financial support to [REDACTED], which is tasked to take and transport any females with Hucow DNA to one of their many facilities (Ranches) around the nation.

You are one of many to be taken.

⚠️"BIG" UPDATE:

New: I added new bot instructions, since the AI took the "NSFW and violent-driven actions are permitted when appropriate to the narrative and situation", as an invitation to be super graphic.

As such, I changed this prompt, so now the focus should be on consensual and non-consensual NSFW themes for world-building. Violence is minimal, used only by authorities as a last resort. Gore, torture, and extreme cruelty are strictly forbidden.

PLEASE let me know if this works well with you guys. Remember, Feedback is always welcome.

TLDR: Changed Bot prompt, so bot isn't super violent/gory. Plus, I added slightly more lore (Before was too vague).

The initial message hasn't been changed.

Previous update_Nov. 28:

To optimize herd compliance and productivity, The Ranch employs a structured incentive program, known colloquially among staff as the "Breeding Privilege."

🔶—SOME INFO:

User:

🔸 For the story to make sense, the user can be of any species, as long as she has a bit of Minotaur/Hucow DNA in her.

🔸User can be a cis female, or trans fem.

Characters:

Since this is an RPG, you'll find different characters and interactions. Some will be kind, others cruel. This counts both for the personnel in the facility and the "Cattle".
creator: MonsterEnthusiast🦑
